{{Quote|Forced robbery of several spaceport guests.|Eno Arba's bounty posting by Rozatta|<ref name="SWBH" />}}
'''Eno Arba''' was an [[Ualaq/Legends|Ualaq]] [[Aqualish/Legends|Aqualish]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Thief/Legends|thief]] associated with the criminals [[Meeko Ghintee]] and [[Magro Slim]]. He had a [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] placed on him by the [[Toydarian/Legends|Toydarian]] [[Rozatta]] for robbing numerous guests in her [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] [[Outland Transit Station]]. While [[Mission to Outland Station|pursing]] criminal Ghintee in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] encountered Arba in [[Merchant Row (Outland Station)|Merchant Row]] aboard Outland Transit Station, where he captured him and claimed his bounty.

==Biography==
[[File:JangoFett-OP.png|thumb|left|200px|Jango Fett came across Eno Arba in Merchant Row.]]
Eno Arba was an [[Ualaq/Legends|Ualaq]] [[Aqualish/Legends|Aqualish]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Thief/Legends|thief]] from<ref name="BHSG" /> the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="wizards">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20030703ando|text=Ando: Planet of the Walrus Men|int=Ando: Planet of the Walrus Men}}</ref> [[Ando]] that was affiliated with the criminals [[Klatooinian/Legends|Klatooinian]] [[Magro Slim]] and [[Muttani]] [[Meeko Ghintee]]. In the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], Arba had a [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] placed on him by the [[Toydarian/Legends|Toydarian]] [[Rozatta]] due to him robbing numerous guests in her<ref name="SWBH" /> [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> [[Outland Transit Station]]. The bounty mentioned Arba's last known location as the [[Space station/Legends|station]] and offered three thousand [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] for capturing the Aqualish alive or fifteen hundred credits for [[Death/Legends|killing]] him.<ref name="SWBH" />

In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]],<ref name="date">The events of ''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' take place in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]] according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] [[Mission to Outland Station|pursued]] Ghintee in order to claim his bounty issued by the [[Republic Correctional Authority/Legends|Republic Correctional Authority]].<ref name="SWBH" /> En route, Fett encountered Arba in [[Merchant Row (Outland Station)|Merchant Row]] aboard Outland Transit Station, where the Aqualish attacked him along with four other malcontents.<ref name="BHSG" />

{{Gamemechanics|Star Wars: Bounty Hunter}}
Fett defeated the thugs and captured Arba, claiming the three thousand credit bounty on him.<ref name="SWBH" />
{{Endgame}}

==Personality and traits==
Eno Arba had [[Color/Legends|brown]] skin, brown [[Hair/Legends|hair]], and black [[Eye/Legends|eyes]]. He forcefully stole from civilians during his [[Time/Legends|time]] at Outland Transit Station.<ref name="SWBH" />

==Skills and abilities==
Eno Arba was capable in combat, engaging Jango Fett with his [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]].<ref name="BHSG" />

==Equipment==
Eno Arba wore brown [[Clothing/Legends|pants]] and a red [[Jacket/Legends|jacket]]. He utilized a blaster during combat.<ref name="SWBH" />

==Behind the scenes==
Eno Arba was created for the [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'', developed by [[LucasArts]] and released in [[2002]]. In the game, Arba is one of ten bounties located in the Merchant Row, the second level on Outland Transit Station on the game's first world. Since claiming Arba's bounty is not essential to completing the game, the player has several different options to go about doing so. The player can ignore Arba entirely, kill him and not claim the bounty, kill him and claim the bounty, or capture him and claim the bounty. This article assumes that Fett captured Arba alive, as doing so gives Fett the maximum reward possible.<ref name="SWBH" />
